name: Greek Tortilla Pinwheels
method: Arrange all of your items ahead of time.
Place the feta cheese and Greek yogurt combination on a tortilla on a
Keep a small border from around the surface clear.
The salad vegetables should be uniformly distributed around the
cheese, followed by the oregano and peppers.
Cover the tortilla in bubble wrap and roll it up as tightly as possible.
Place in the fridge for about 30 minutes to firm up.
Remove the tortilla from the wrapper and cut it into 8 even pieces.
Layout flat on a tray to serve.
